creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 175543
pecl-stomp2.shar

pecl-stomp allows php applications to communicate with any
Stomp compliant Message Brokers through easy object oriented
and procedural interfaces.

WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/stomp

This version is specific to php70 compared to net-im/pecl-stomp.

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: 
	poudriere: i386,  9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  12    (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 12    (OK)
